sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّقْسُ جَمِيلًا الْيَوْمَ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Danas je bilo lijepo vrijeme u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The weather was nice today in the city.

sentences.arabic: خَرَجَ الأَطْفَالُ لِلَّعِبِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su izašla da se igraju u javnom parku.
sentences.translationEn: The children went out to play in the public park.

sentences.translation: Odrasli su sjedili na klupama i razgovarali.
sentences.translationEn: The adults sat on the benches and talked.

sentences.translation: Atmosfera u parku bila je mirna i ugodna.
sentences.translationEn: The atmosphere in the park was calm and enjoyable.
